channel.title: CamaleonCMS on Scorpiosec
channel.description: Recent content in CamaleonCMS on Scorpiosec

item.title: HTB: Facts
item.description: Platform: Hack The Box Link: Facts Level: Easy OS: Linux Facts begins with the discovery of a vulnerable Camaleon CMS instance affected by CVE-2025-2304, where a mass assignment flaw allows privilege escalation to administrator. Access to the CMS dashboard reveals AWS-compatible MinIO credentials, which are used to enumerate internal S3 buckets and recover an SSH private key. After cracking the SSH key passphrase with John the Ripper, access is obtained as the user trivia via SSH.
